inline_comments.message: I'm not very convinced to renaming all ports to http/https...

Well,
First, this is a kind of "mandatory" requirement from Istio (https://istio.io/docs/ops/configuration/traffic-management/protocol-selection/#manual-protocol-selection). I could have set 'http-so-catdb-port' but:
* this is the only port and it's under 'catalogdb' service
* I don't really know its purpose (I think it's API so I could have set http-api)

To be honest, I was thinking like you on this naming but after a while, I think it's not that bad:

The service has a clear name.
We know it's HTTP for this one.

So we know how to connect.

and again, the previous name was not really meaningful too...
